reviews.comment:
Mala atención, baños cerrados llegas de noche de la ruta y no tenes posibilidad de ir al baño, ni embarazada ni vieja ni niños
Mala predisposición de los vendedores de combustibles, tenés q esperar q terminen mandar mensajes de wapps, o despertarlos duermen en un auto, la vdad irrecomendable

La otra YPF de los talas mejor atencion

(Translated by Google)
Poor service, closed restrooms. You arrive at night from the highway and there's no way to use the restroom, not even for pregnant women, the elderly, or children. The fuel attendants are unhelpful; you have to wait for them to finish sending WhatsApp messages or wake them up—they sleep in their cars. Honestly, I wouldn't recommend this station.

The other YPF station in Los Talas has much better service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3860923549066547305/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNSbVp1NXR3RRAB
